spot_note: After-hours price 734.25 at ~20:00 ET 5/19. 5/19 RTH: high=738.10 (exact Carry resistance — bears defended perfectly), low=732.33 (morning session), close=733.77. Daily-review FAILED at 16:30 ET (API rate-limit). These levels written by overnight wake cycle per OP-25.

levels.source: 2026-05-18 RTH session high — 2-touch rejection. Expires EOD 5/20.
levels.reasoning: Clean 2-touch rejection 5/18: premarket PMH 741.30 + RTH first-bar high 741.40. Bears defended twice. 5/19 RTH never reached this level (session high was 738.10). Expires EOD 5/20 — monitor for re-promotion if tested again.

Was flipped support from 5/13 reclaim. Broke on 5/18 10:35 bar. Clusters with 738.10 as 738.10–738.86 overhead resistance zone. 5/19 RTH tested up to 738.10 and rejected; 738.86 not touched. Any retest from below = bearish rejection candidate.

levels.source: Former 5-hold Carry — broke 2026-05-18 10:35 ET on 2.0x volume. 5/19 RTH exact session HIGH (3rd defense since break inversion).
levels.reasoning: THE level going into 5/20. Originally the binary bull/bear level (5 holds, 0 breaks). Broke decisively 5/18 10:35. Role reversed. Then: (1) 5/19 PM premarket opened at 739.06 → immediate rejection to 735.60 = 1st post-break defense. (2) 5/19 RTH: session HIGH = 738.10 exactly — bears capped the session at this level precisely. Touch count now 8, respect count 6. This is the dominant resistance for the week. Bull reclaim above 738.10 on volume would be MAJOR — flip to support = regime change.

Friday 5/15 close. SPY briefly traded ABOVE this during 5/19 afternoon (bars 13:20-15:00 ET ranged 736-737). Then broke below 737.26 as afternoon sell-off developed. Less structurally significant now that 735.40 is the active broken support. Awareness-level reference inside the 735.40–738.10 congestion zone.

levels.source: 2026-05-18 RTH session low (2-touch) — BROKE 5/19 15:30 ET, now resistance.
levels.reasoning: Was 5/18 session low support, defended twice (10:35 + 14:30 ET on 5/18). On 5/19: SPY tested 735.40 multiple times in late afternoon, finally broke at 15:30 ET bar (close=734.89, vol=57399). Never reclaimed before 4pm close (RTH close=733.77). Role flipped: now the first overhead resistance for 5/20. BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON candidate if SPY opens gap-up near 735.40 then fails. BULLISH_RECLAIM candidate (DRAFT watch) if SPY punches through on volume.

session_bias.reasoning: SPY closed 733.77 after rejecting 738.10★★★ (exact session high). Price is BELOW all key resistance levels (735.40★★, 738.10★★★). AH 734.25 — no meaningful recovery. Ribbon at AH: MIXED (Fast>Pivot>Slow but Close below Fast, 49c spread). 50 SMA at ~733.65 → price is near/at 50 SMA. Bear case: failed reclaim of 735.40 → BEARISH_REJECTION_RIDE_THE_RIBBON → target 732.33 or below. Bull case: gap-up open + close above 735.40 on volume = regime flip attempt. Lean BEARISH unless 735.40 reclaimed in first 30 min.
session_bias.key_scenario_bear: Open below 735.40 → retest 735.40 from below → rejection → BEAR ENTER, target 732.33/730
session_bias.key_scenario_bull: Gap-up past 735.40 + 735.40 holds as support → BULL watch, target 738.10
session_bias.invalidation_bear: Closes above 735.40 on 5m bar with vol ≥1.5× avg within first 2 bars
